pages.name: Shift U Pricing
pages.tagline: Every offer, one page, in CAD.
pages.summary: Shift U's pricing page lists two categories: done-for-you services (landing pages, full websites, Google and Meta ads, AI chat agents, voice agents, and a full conversion system) and AI training programs (Operator Certification, Private Team Training, and Workforce Transformation). Each offer carries fixed scope, a written guarantee, and a stated turnaround time. Prices range from $350 one-time for a landing page up to a $55,000 flat engagement for Workforce Transformation.
pages.pricing: SERVICES: Landing Pages from $350 (one-time). Full Website from $800 (quoted by scope). Google and Meta Ads $300 per month, plus ad spend. AI Chat Agent $150 to $250 per month. Voice Agent per seat (quoted by call volume). Conversion System quoted (site plus CRM plus attribution). PROGRAMS: AI Operator Certification $7,500 per seat. Private Team Training $22,500 flat program fee (Most picked). Workforce Transformation $55,000 flat engagement.

pages.capgRemoved: Removed all Canada-Alberta Job Grant (CAJG) and funding content. Specifically stripped: the page's two-category framing of "Services (Not Grant Eligible)" vs "Programs (CAJG Eligible)" and the per-service "not grant eligible" labels; the per-program "Net after CAJG" prices and "Grant covers" amounts (AI Operator Certification net $2,550 / grant covers $4,950; Private Team Training net $7,650 / grant covers $14,850; Workforce Transformation net $18,700 / grant covers $36,300); the statements "The Canada-Alberta Job Grant covers up to 66 percent of AI training, with up to $10,000 per trainee per year", "Up to 66 percent funded, up to $10,000 per trainee per year, through 2028", "66% CAJG covers Of eligible training costs for Alberta employers, funded through 2028", "$10,000 Per trainee cap Maximum funded per trainee per year", and "CAJG covers up to 66 percent of eligible training costs, up to $10,000 per trainee per year, funded through 2028. The sticker price stays on the invoice, the grant reimburses the qualifying portion after Adam files the paperwork. The net column you see beside every program is the real out-of-pocket once funding lands"; the "CAJG paperwork handled by Adam" benefit; the entire "Alberta Options" comparison table (Shift U vs NorQuest/Bow Valley/MacEwan vs Big-4 Consultancy vs Self-paced, including the "CAJG up to 66% funding" row, "On-site Alberta delivery" row, and "Net after CAJG" price rows); the grant calculator disclaimer about eligibility, claim amount, reimbursement timing and Alberta Labour approval; and three grant-related FAQ questions ("How does the Canada-Alberta Job Grant change the price I actually pay?", "Which Shift U offers are CAJG eligible and which are not?", and the FAQ answer about CAJG covering up to 66 percent). Kept the underlying services, programs, their sticker/list prices, scope, guarantees, and turnaround times.

pages.name: Landing Pages
pages.tagline: One page. One offer. Designed to convert. Built in under 7 business days, or we refund the deposit.
pages.summary: A done-for-you landing page service offering three tiers (Standard, Extended, Full Site) that builds a single-offer, conversion-first page with researched copy, custom design, mobile-first sub-2-second load, SEO/schema, and a contact form. Pages ship in under 7 business days (2-3 weeks for full sites) with three revision rounds included.
pages.pricing: Standard: $350 one-time. Extended: $450 one-time. Full Site: starting at $800 (scales up to 6 to 10 pages on quote). Prices in USD. A deposit at booking secures the build slot. Balance on launch.

How it works Day 2: Strategy and copy draft (section map, conversion hook, approval)

proof: Medical Aesthetics, Edmonton: Before, 800 visitors/month to a 5-page site with under 1% form conversion. After: 312% lift in booking form submissions, first 30 days
Home Services, Alberta: Before, 71% bounce rate, $84 cost per lead. After: 47% drop in cost per qualified lead
B2B SaaS, Remote: Before, long-form page with 7 CTAs and confused leads. After: 184% increase in demo bookings, quarter over quarter
faq: Q: What does the 7 business day promise actually cover? A: From the moment your intake form and deposit clear, you get the live page within 7 business days. If we miss that window for any reason on our side, the deposit comes back. Client-side delays on copy approval or asset delivery pause the clock and we will tell you when they do.

pages.name: AI Chat Agent
pages.tagline: A chat agent that actually knows your business.
pages.summary: A custom website chat agent trained on the business's hours, services, pricing logic, and the same 30 questions the team answers every week. It books qualified meetings, qualifies and routes leads to the inbox, and hands live conversations to a human. Delivered via a 14-day pilot with a one-time setup fee.
pages.pricing: $150 to $250 setup, paid one time. Stated as "Maximum setup fee, paid one time only" with a counter animating $0 to $250. A monthly running cost is referenced via the FAQ question "How much does it cost to run each month?" but the answer text is collapsed in an accordion and not present in the static page render, so no monthly dollar figure is published in the extractable content.
included: Trained answers locked in before launch day (the same 30 questions, trained on your real answers)
Awake 24/7 - 'Awake every night your team is asleep'
Answer the same 30 questions: hours, services, pricing ranges, location, financing, warranty
Book qualified meetings: walks the visitor through 4 to 6 qualification questions, then drops them into your calendar with the answers attached
Qualify and route leads: tags each conversation by intent and urgency, routes hot ones to your sales inbox while quiet ones go to follow-up
Reply in English or French: detects the visitor language on the first message and responds in kind
Hand off to a human: when the conversation gets specific, the agent pauses and pings your team on Slack or email so a person can take over
Stay on topic: guardrails keep it answering for your business only, no off-brand replies, no leaking the prompt, no fabricated quotes
Integration - Google Calendar and Calendly: reads your real availability before offering a slot, then writes the booking back with notes
Integration - HubSpot, Pipedrive, GoHighLevel: each conversation becomes a contact and a deal in your CRM with the source page, intent tag, and full transcript
Integration - Slack, Gmail, Outlook: hot leads ping the channel or inbox you choose, with a one-line summary plus a link to the transcript
Integration - Zapier and webhooks: any tool with a webhook can listen (Notion for transcripts, Airtable for triage, help desk for tickets)
Pairs with the Voice Agent: if a visitor wants to talk instead of type, the chat hands off to the Shift U voice agent for inbound calls and bookings
Knowledge base of your choice: Notion, Google Docs, your website, or a flat PDF; the agent re-reads it on a schedule so updates show up automatically
keyPoints: Hero subheadline: 'Trained on your hours, services, pricing logic and the same 30 questions your team answers every week. It books meetings, qualifies leads and hands the live ones to your inbox.'
Pairs with the Shift U Voice Agent and Conversion System 'if you want bookings, calls and attribution under one roof.'

Section 'What it does - Six jobs it ships with on day one.' Every Shift U chat agent runs the same six jobs out of the box; the training, tone and integrations are tuned to your business during the 14-day pilot.
Integrations philosophy: 'The chat agent does not replace your stack, it routes into it. Calendar reads, CRM writes, Slack pings, webhooks for anything else.'

14-day pilot: 'From kickoff to live on your site in two weeks. No multi-month rollout. We use the first week to train and the second week to test. By day 14 it is live, your team has the runbook, and you own the prompts.'
Day 1 - Discovery and prompt design: 'We pull your top 30 questions from real customer messages, your team, and your existing FAQ. Then we draft the system prompt.'
Day 2 to 5 - Knowledge base and integrations: 'We wire your calendar, CRM, and Slack. We load the knowledge base. We tune tone, refusal patterns, and handoff triggers.'
Day 6 to 9 - Internal pilot: 'Your team uses it for a week and tries to break it. We patch every gap, retrain on the misses, and lock the guardrails.'
Day 10 to 14 - Public launch and tuning: 'We go live on your site. We watch the first wave of real conversations, fix what slips, and write the handoff runbook.'
Closing CTA: 'Want one trained on your 30 questions? Book a 20-minute discovery call. We walk your site, your top inbound questions, and the two integrations that would matter most.'
proof: Testimonial: 'Most chat tools are toys with a fancy bubble. A real chat agent is a teammate who never forgets a price, never misses a lead, and never sends a visitor searching for the answer.' — Joshua, Sales and Discovery Lead at Shift U
Stat block: 14 days from kickoff to public launch (trained answers locked in before launch day)
Stat block: 30+ questions trained
Stat block: 24/7 ('Awake every night your team is asleep')
Stat block: $250 maximum setup fee, paid one time only
faq: Q: How is this different from a generic chatbot? A: Generic chatbots answer from a public model with no context. Ours is trained on your hours, services, pricing logic, objections, and refund rules, then guarded so it stays on topic. It also books, not just talks.

pages.name: Voice Agent
pages.tagline: AI that answers calls and books appointments
pages.summary: Done-for-you AI voice agent that answers your phone line 24/7, qualifies callers, books appointments straight into your calendar, and sends a transcript and summary the moment the call ends. Priced at $500 one-time setup plus $99/month (includes up to 500 inbound minutes). Goes live in 5 business days, month-to-month after setup.
pages.pricing: One-time setup: $500. Monthly platform fee: $99 (includes up to 500 inbound minutes, hosting, monitoring, monthly tuning). Overage billed at a flat per-minute rate with a usage alert at 80 percent. Month-to-month after the one-time setup.
included: One-time setup: $500
Monthly platform fee: $99 — includes up to 500 inbound minutes, hosting, monitoring, monthly tuning
Twenty four hour coverage. No more missed after hours calls, no more weekend voicemail piles. The agent stays on shift permanently.
English and French ready. Trained on Alberta accents. We can wire in additional languages on request.
Human handoff, not a wall. When intent gets complex, the agent warm transfers to your line or sends a same hour callback request.
Lands inside your stack. Bookings into Google Calendar, Calendly, Acuity, Jobber, or your in house CRM. Transcripts into HubSpot, Pipedrive, or Notion.
After each call you receive a transcript, a one paragraph summary, the caller intent, and the booking outcome — sent by email, SMS, or pushed into your CRM
Live in 5 business days for standard setup; you review and approve the agent before any caller hears it
keyPoints: Headline: AI that answers calls and books appointments
Hero subcopy: Stop losing leads after hours. A natural voice agent answers your line, qualifies the caller, books straight into your calendar, and sends you a transcript the moment the call ends.
How it works step 1 — A real number answers, day or night: We forward your existing line, or attach a new local Edmonton number. The agent picks up on the first ring with your business name and tone.

How it works step 2 — It listens, qualifies, and answers: The agent works from a knowledge base built from your services, pricing rules, hours, and policies. It handles common questions without guessing.

How it works step 3 — It books, reschedules, or escalates: Open slots pull live from Google Calendar or your booking system. The caller hears available times and confirms by voice. Complex calls get warm transferred to a human.

How it works step 4 — You get a clean summary, every time: After each call, you receive a transcript, a one paragraph summary, the caller intent, and the booking outcome. Sent by email, SMS, or pushed into your CRM.
Closing CTA section headline: Stop letting good leads hit voicemail.
Closing CTA copy: Twenty minutes on a discovery call. We walk through a sample call built on your services, your pricing, and your tone. You decide if it is ready to answer your line.
Primary CTA button: Book a discovery call (links to /contact?service=voice-agent)
proof: 248 — Calls answered
171 — Bookings closed
1:42 — Avg duration
faq: Does it sound like a robot? — No. The voice is natural, with timing and breath patterns that match a trained receptionist. Most callers do not realize it is AI until they are told.

What happens when the agent does not know an answer? — It says so honestly, captures the question, and either books a callback with a human or routes the live call to your team. It never invents information.

Can it actually book on my calendar? — Yes. We connect to Google Calendar, Calendly, Acuity, Jobber, or your existing scheduling tool. The agent reads live availability and writes confirmed bookings back.
How long until it goes live? — Five business days for standard setup. Knowledge base build is the longest step. You review and approve the agent before any caller hears it.
What if call volume goes above 500 minutes per month? — Overage is billed at a flat per minute rate, no surprises. We send a usage alert at 80 percent so you can decide before any extra charge lands.
Can I cancel? — Yes. Month to month after the one time setup. If you stop, we hand over the knowledge base and transcripts so nothing walks out the door with us.

pages.name: Shift U
pages.tagline: Built by operators, for Alberta operators.
pages.summary: About page for Shift U, an Edmonton company that does two things on purpose: it certifies one operator inside your business to run AI work end to end, and it ships the systems, sites and ads that put that operator to work the same quarter. The page tells the origin story, lays out four operating principles, introduces the three-person team, explains the Edmonton/Alberta-only focus, and lists open roles and partnership referrals.
included: Operator certification (run AI work end to end)
A working automation
Refunded deposit on a late landing page
Zero Bottleneck Promise on the first 30 days
100 percent pass rate on Operator Certification
Transformation Guarantee on the enterprise tier
Landing pages live in under 7 business days or we refund the deposit
Services listed in footer: Landing Pages, Full Website, Google and Meta Ads, AI Chat Agent, Voice Agent, Conversion System
Programs listed in footer: AI Operator Certification, Private Team Training, Workforce Transformation
keyPoints: Shift U is an Edmonton company that does two things on purpose: certify one operator inside your business to run AI work end to end, and ship the systems, sites and ads that put that operator to work the same quarter.

ORIGIN: We started Shift U because Alberta business owners kept asking the same question. 'I want one person on my team who can run AI work like a senior.' Nobody was selling that. So we built it. (Joshua, Sales and Discovery Lead)

Marcus had been shipping AI workflows inside production businesses since 2019. Joshua had been selling to Alberta SMBs for a decade. Adam had been running disciplined project management that keeps a 7 day promise from slipping. The gap was not the technology, it was a trained operator inside the building who knew the business.
WHAT WE STAND ON: Four principles, written down on day one. They explain why every engagement runs the way it runs, and why we say no to roughly half the leads we meet.

Principle 1 - Operator-run, not consultant-run: Every program is led by people who have shipped revenue inside small businesses, not slide decks. Marcus has run operations, Joshua has closed sales, Adam has owned client outcomes.

Principle 2 - Edmonton and Alberta only: We pick a 90 minute drive radius from downtown Edmonton on purpose. Local case studies, local payroll math, and a facilitator who can drive to your office for the on-site week.

Principle 3 - Outcomes are the deliverable: Operator certification, a working automation, a refunded deposit on a late landing page. We tie every engagement to a result you can measure, and we put it in writing before the kickoff call.

Principle 4 - Guarantees in writing: Zero Bottleneck Promise on the first 30 days. 100 percent pass rate on Operator Certification. Transformation Guarantee on the enterprise tier. Landing pages live in under 7 business days or we refund the deposit.

THE TEAM: Three operators, one phone number. Small company, on purpose. Joshua scopes the work, Marcus runs the training, Adam owns the build week to week. You work with all three, by name, for the life of the engagement.
WHY EDMONTON AND ALBERTA ONLY: A 90 minute radius is a feature, not a limit. We turn down work outside the province on purpose.

Reason 01 - 90 minute radius from downtown Edmonton: Every on-site coaching day is a same day drive. Calgary, Red Deer, Sherwood Park, Spruce Grove, St. Albert and Leduc are all in scope. Past that radius we send teams to remote programs instead.

Reason 03 - 5 to 50 employees, our sweet spot: Big enough to feel the gap an AI operator closes, small enough that one trained person changes the trajectory of the company. If you are over 200 staff, our enterprise tier still applies, the rhythm just shifts.
Outside Alberta? Workforce Transformation is available remote-first for organizations over 200 staff. Joshua will triage on the discovery call.
OPEN ROLES AND PARTNERSHIPS: Build with us, or refer work to us. Two roles open right now, plus a standing line for CPAs, payroll firms, accountants and chambers who serve Alberta SMBs.

Senior AI Facilitator (Full-time / Edmonton, hybrid): Co-lead Operator Certification cohorts with Marcus. Production experience with LLM agents and workflow tooling required. You will own week 4 through 8 of the curriculum within your first cohort.

Implementation Engineer (Full-time / Edmonton, hybrid): Build the chat agents, voice agents and conversion systems we sell on the digital services side. Ship one or two engagements per month end to end, from kickoff to handoff.

LET US TALK: A 30 minute call, no pitch deck. Just your numbers. Bring the bottleneck, the team size and the budget. We bring the path and the price. If we are not a fit, you walk with a free scorecard either way.
Contact: General enquiries hello@shiftu.ca; Discovery calls booked on the calendar; Studio in Edmonton, Alberta; Edmonton time, weekdays 9 to 5.

Team member Joshua - Sales and Discovery Lead: Runs every discovery call. Decides whether we are a fit before we send a quote. Spent a decade selling to Alberta SMBs across services, trades and professional firms. Owns: Discovery, scoping, fit checks, contracts and kickoff.

Team member Marcus - Lead Facilitator: Designs and runs Operator Certification and Private Training. The voice in the room every Tuesday. Has shipped AI workflows inside production businesses since 2019. Owns: Curriculum, cohort facilitation, on-site coaching weeks, certification scoring, post-grad office hours. If you walk out of week 8 not running AI work end to end, that is on him.

Team member Adam - Account Manager: Owns the client relationship after kickoff. Keeps the build on schedule and the team unblocked. Flags a slipping deadline before it slips. Owns: Project management, status updates, blocker resolution, deliverable QA and renewal conversations. The reason the 7 day promise holds is that Adam will not let it not hold.
proof: Marcus has been shipping AI workflows inside production businesses since 2019

5 to 50 employees is the stated sweet spot

Landing pages live in under 7 business days or deposit refunded
Say no to roughly half the leads we meet
